titleStmt.title: SII 26.125: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 125. (A.R. No. 120-A of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This damaged inscription dated in the 151st day of the 4th year of the king record an order of the king to the residents of Koḻumam granting of some land to the east of the tank called Kēraḷakēsarippērēri in Koḻumam together with the incomes from levies like iṟai, puṟavu, siddhāyam, elavai, yugavai, etc., as amāvāsippuṟam for offerings to god of a temple (name not preserved), during the procession on the Amāvāsyā days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Written in continuation of No. 123 above. svastiśrī . koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ koyil cikāriya
ṉukku Amāvāsitoṟum puṟappaṭṭaruḷi Amutuceytaruḷaveṇṭum Amutupaṭi viñcaṉaṅkaḷukku Amāvāsippuṟamāka viṭṭanilamāvatu koḻumattu keraḷakesarip pererikkiḻ periyamākkaṇṇāṟṟukkuk kiḻakku taṭiyoṉṟiṉāl vitai Iru tūṇikkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Ikkaṇṇāṟṟukku meṟkutaṭi
tai Irukalamum Iṟai puṟavu siddhāyam Elavai yukavai maṟṟum Eṟppeṟpaṭṭutuṅ koḷḷātomāka koḻumattu Ūrāṟku nam Olaikuṭuttom Iddhanmam candrāditta vaṟ celvatāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷka yāṇṭu nālaāvatu nāḷ 100 5 10 1 .
Digital edition of SII 26.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
